sentence_reviews.text: Outputs are generated step by step, conditioning each decision on prior outputs.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Deep Learning and PML support autoregressive sequence modeling and conditional probabilistic generation background.
sentence_reviews.notes: The cited source set supports the exact autoregressive decoding claim.

sentence_reviews.text: Its benefit depends on implementation, scale, data, and hardware; the same mechanism can add complexity without improving the target workload. Its direct dependencies include Autoregressive / next-step prediction, Sequences, events & time series.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Synthesized from cited node sources plus the atlas dependency context in data/atlas.json.
sentence_reviews.notes: Limitation is reviewed as a broad synthesis/tradeoff statement for the family-level node, not as a direct quotation from one source.
